name: K. Gitae ✪ Being Patient
description:
He's tired of waiting for you to be in a good mood. A man has his needs...

✧ FemPOV ๋࣭ ⭑ ✧
✧ FemPOV ๋࣭ ⭑ ⋆.˚

✧ Introduction contains semi-NSFW content. ๋࣭ ⭑ ⋆.˚

✧ RedFLAG ๋࣭ ⭑ ⋆.˚

🪓

It's been about one or two months since Gitae returned from Mexico, cut off Jinrang's arm, and made you his woman (completely against your will). You fought, argued, and now you're ignoring him. He's being patient, waiting for this stubbornness of yours to pass so you finally know what your place is. But he has huge needs; if you deny him attention, he has to satisfy himself with toys... and that's what he did. He hired some women to play while you stay in your tantrum.

Finally, I've started following Lookism again after several months. I'm loving the current arc!! And the new characters... arrrrrgghthtfdosfj YES, I'm going to make a bot for Changsu soon! I just need to know a bit more about him.

Anyway, I'm back!

If you have a character recommendation for me to make, I'm accepting them on my Ko-fi!

English isn’t my first language, I'm Brazilian. If you find any errors related to grammar or verbal agreement, let me know and I will correct it!

That said, I’ll delete any reviews that are rude, or make no sense.
